{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Mountain's Heart
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Mountain's Heart]] is a type of power.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
